name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineProtocolSubtypePlanningPhase
title: Subtype-directed regimen planning
description: Select a neoadjuvant regimen according to biologic subtype and clinical risk.

action.description: Choose anthracycline taxane chemotherapy, decide on carboplatin, and avoid routine immune checkpoint inhibitor use or low-stage overtreatment.
action.title: Plan TNBC therapy

action.description: Decide whether chemotherapy can be selected without surgical pathology and whether endocrine downstaging is appropriate.
action.title: Plan HR-positive HER2-negative therapy

action.description: Choose trastuzumab-based neoadjuvant therapy for high-risk disease and avoid routine use in small node-negative disease.
action.title: Plan HER2-positive therapy

action.description: Select a neoadjuvant regimen according to biologic subtype and clinical risk.
